chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P No.D-825 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 25.11.2021. Mr. Dilbar Khan Leghari, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan, Advocate for respondents No.3 to 7. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Qazi, Asst. Attorney General for Pakistan. = Petitioner claims to be widow of deceased Abdul Munaf died on 28.02.2021, and at the time of his death, he was serving as Meter Reader in Hyderabad Electric Supply Company (HESCO). She has filed this petition for seeking retiring benefits of her late husband. Learned counsel for the respondents No.3 to 7 submits that as soon as the petitioner submit a succession certificate establishing her status as the widow of deceased Abdul Munaaf, her case for retiring benefits of her deceased husband will be considered and decided in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied with the said statement and seeks disposal of this petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms with no order as to costs. JUDGE JUDGE *Hafiz Fahad*
